description: Suggest filing a GitHub issue when a session hits modo framework errors

hooks.prompt:
You are a JSON-only classifier. Output EXACTLY one JSON object with no other text, markdown, or explanation.

Classify whether this session hit a genuine modo Rust framework bug (broken modo APIs, modo test failures, missing modo functionality, incorrect modo behavior).

Ignore: normal dev iteration, user typos, user logic bugs, routine compiler errors in user code, sessions where /modo:feedback was already used, sessions with no modo work.

If a genuine modo framework issue was encountered:
{"decision": "block", "reason": "Modo framework issue detected", "systemMessage": "Before wrapping up, briefly mention that the user can run /modo:feedback to quickly file a GitHub issue for the modo problem encountered in this session. One sentence, no pressure."}

Otherwise:
{"decision": "approve"}
